name: Focaccia with Parmesan
recipeInstructions:
Recipe by: Jo Anne Merrill Preparation Time: 2:00
1. Dissolve the yeast and sugar in 3/4 cup warm water (about 110 degrees).
2. Stir 1 cup flour into the yeast mixture. Cover with plastic wrap and let the dough rest until it has doubled in size, about 1 hour.
3. Into the yeast mixture, add the remaining 1/2 cup warm water, 2 tablespoons olive oil, salt, grated Parmesan cheese, crushed dried rosemary, cornmeal, coarse salt, and black pepper.
4. Oil a large bowl. Put the dough into the bowl, cover loosely, and let rise until doubled in size, about 1 hour.
5. Preheat oven to 475 degrees F (245 C). Sprinkle a baking sheet with cornmeal.
6. Divide the dough into 4 portions. Shape each portion into a rough loaf or flatbread shape.
7. Bake on the preheated baking sheet for 20 minutes or until golden brown.
